settings.heading: Returns & Refunds
settings.intro: Straightforward returns, because buying tech should feel low-risk.

settings.content:
30-day returns

You have 30 days from the delivery date to request a return. To be eligible, items should be in their original condition and packaging, with all included accessories.

How to start a return

There are two easy ways to begin:

  • From your account: sign in, open your Orders page, select the order, and start a return.
  • By email: contact us at Alvaro.herard@emporx.com with your order number and the item you'd like to return, and we'll guide you through it.

Refunds

Once your return is received and inspected, we'll email you to confirm. Approved refunds are issued to your original payment method, with a processing time of 7–14 business days depending on your bank or card provider. Original shipping charges may be non-refundable.

Exchanges

Need a different model or variant? Let us know when you start your return and we'll help arrange an exchange where stock allows.

Damaged or defective items

If an item arrives damaged or defective, contact us right away at Alvaro.herard@emporx.com. We'll make it right with a replacement, repair, or refund.
